title: astragalus humillimus
intro: Astragalus humillimus is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its adaptogenic properties and potential to boost the immune system. The medicinal properties of Astragalus humillimus are believed to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may provide health benefits such as reducing stress and improving overall well-being. Astragalus humillimus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
